extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR attacked on penultimate climb, dropped CARAPAZ immediately, bridged solo to breakaway in big ring on final HC climb, took yellow by 1:48.
tactical_patterns: UAE Emirates isolated early but attacked anyway on penultimate climb, flipping numerical disadvantage into psychological dominance through overwhelming power.
POGAČAR used big ring on final HC climb while chasing, signal of supernatural form that paralyzed GC rivals.
Race split from kilometer zero on uncategorized climb, exposing THOMAS/ROGLIČ before real mountains even started.
CARAPAZ got CASTROVIEJO support but still couldn't hold POGAČAR, revealing INEOS domestique help meaningless against pure power.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: Solo bridged 31 seconds to breakaway on final HC climb in big ring, unprecedented power display changed entire GC hierarchy in one stage.
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: Dropped on uncategorized descent before kilometer zero, never regained contact, eliminated before real racing started.
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: negative: Lost contact early despite starting well, Tour hopes ended on first mountain stage.
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: Only rider to initially follow POGAČAR but dropped quickly despite INEOS support, gap to winner 1:48.
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: negative: Failed yellow jersey ambition, battled but couldn't reach front group despite early positioning.
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: positive: Made front breakaway at 6:30 from yellow, survived to third place, strong mountain form signal.
